title: cryptocoryne × batangkayanensis
intro:
Cryptocoryne × batangkayanensis, a hybrid aquatic plant, is a result of crossing Cryptocoryne beckettii and Cryptocoryne wendtii, and is primarily used for its ornamental value in aquariums due to its distinctive leaf shape and color.

There is limited information available regarding the medicinal properties of Cryptocoryne × batangkayanensis. 
However, the parent species, Cryptocoryne beckettii and Cryptocoryne wendtii, have been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.

The potential health benefits of the parent species, such as Cryptocoryne beckettii, are still being researched and include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. 

Due to the lack of information regarding its medicinal properties, herbal preparations using Cryptocoryne × batangkayanensis are not well-documented.
